subject: Fulfillment Delay and Billing Dispute
description: My headset has not shipped! I paid extra for express delivery. Also, my credit card company flagged a double authorization charge. I want this resolved immediately or I will file a chargeback!

subject: Add shipping instructions
description: Please leave the box behind the black gate. Thank you!

subject: VIP Order Cancellation Request
description: My smart thermostat is on backorder customs hold but my home heating system is currently broken! Please cancel this immediately or ship it today. This is unacceptable for a VIP member.

subject: Feedback - Great product!
description: The ergonomic office chair arrived exactly on time and has completely relieved my back strain. Thank you for the fast shipping!

subject: Stolen Account & Unauthorized Charge
description: There is a pending charge on my credit card for $899.00 and an order for a gaming monitor has been placed under my account. I did not purchase this! My profile must have been hacked. Block this shipment immediately!

subject: Earbuds return policy query
description: Hello, I just wanted to verify if I can return these earbud units if they do not fit comfortably in my ears? What is the window for accessory returns?

subject: Wrong shipping address
description: Oops, I noticed the delivery address is set to my old apartment address. Can you please correct the address to my current flat before it is delivered by FedEx?

subject: Out of stock notice refund
description: My power bank is delayed on supplier shortage and has not shipped. Can you please cancel this order and issue a full refund back to my card? I will buy it elsewhere.
